name: Sausage Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the Italian sausage into a 30-ounce casserole dish.
2. Stir in the chopped onion.
3. Cook, uncovered, on high power for 2½ to 3½ minutes or until the sausage is done, stirring once.
4. Drain off excess fat.
5. Stir in the catsup and oregano.
6. Cook, uncovered, on high power for 30 to 45 seconds or until the sausage mixture is heated through.
7. Place the bottom of a French roll on a paper towel-lined plate.
8. Spoon the sausage mixture onto the roll bottom.
9. Top with cheese slice and roll top.
10. Cook, uncovered, on high power for an additional 30 to 45 seconds or until the cheese melts. Serve immediately.
